reviews.review_description: The is such a fun and realistic game. I’ve always wanted a good shooter game… some down sides is I was really looking forward to getting Zero caliber:2 but is 25 bucks… pls make the price cheaper because I spent 400 on a VR and all the games are expensive. Other than that… I would really recommend this game!!!
Theres an issue with the ammo. When you get the little boxes of ammunition, you cant use it. I pressed every button on my controller and nothing was happening.

This is a great game it's just like real life there is a choice between any gun you need/want. there is training and everything but just one comment, can you guys please add a zombie shooting thing instead of just cardboard? But other then that, great game I would really recommend it!!!!!!!!!!

Very immersive. Even the general range is fun. Literally have no complaints for a free app. 

Actual game wise. The belt. Ammo recognition seems like it needs larger boundaries. Or rather. No need to START with knife and grenade.

It's so fun though. Need to practice in the ccq course.

This game is very realistic my favorite parts is the minigames There is so much guns to play with my fav gun is the mp5  thanknyou people for this game❤️❤️❤️❤️

love you creaters
You should add a zombie or multi-player.

This game is so fun. Walls of guns and accessories.  Weapons handle realistically and shooting range functions perfectly.  I was shocked this was available for free. It convinced me to buy one of their pcvr games.
Bro the thing won’t let me play

It would be even better if they allowed those who have ACE Pistol control adapters to use them in this game. They would only need to add a switch that can be activated in settings for the adapter. Since the controller is held in a backwards position.

I honestly wasn't expecting so much but this game surprised me in just about every way possible I love the customization it's one of the most unique I've seen ever in a VR game some of the attachments that you can put on certain guns look like they shouldn't be on there but thats what makes the customization so good the gun sounds and all mechanics are amazing some improvements could be made like kill house with bots that have a customizable difficulty settings another cool feature that could be added is random jams for a more realistic feel tac lights would also be a good addition also a night map there's so many things that could make this game even better

reviews.review_title: Its Free , a lot of Gun to play.
reviews.review_description:
Free app , Many Gun (So Real) + RPG + house stomping shooting training. + Many Scope + Gun accessories. 
I play until finish battery still want more.
From 1990 till 2025 this is Best Gun related Game ever.
 ThankYou developed for made it Free.
It is the best gun game it needs more modes
The game is cool, great graphics, but I can’t reload

after playing the game the game kinda sucks and the reason is every time i try to reload it it won't let me why don't know it does like me keeps on making me grab the grip of the gun and it's annoying i hope you please fix this if so this will probably a better game but it's pretty sucky 😑
Has great functions and great details and more

This is really good! The gun range is pretty fun and realistic in reloading and shooting mechanics. I need to adjust the movement to make it smoother but it even takes into consideration your height. Overall love the experience. I have to get the campaign once I get comfortable with the movement and controls. But this free gun range is just what I was looking for. Thank you.

reviews.review_title: I just don’t get it. How is free?
reviews.review_description: Realistic, graphic mechanics, gun, movement, gun mechanics, gun, graphics, hand, graphics, hand, mechanics,  just how is this free  ￼￼

reviews.review_title: Perfect for free to play players
reviews.review_description: I'm free to play players, and it's hard to find a game that isn't paid or badly developed, but my biggest issue is that I can hardly find shooting range games that isn't free or bugged but that's when this game takes the place for my needs it's literally has a very wide variety of guns and customizations for your weapons it also has multiple kill houses to train except of one for you to get used to tight corners to cut through very good game.
As an ex marine, I was so happy to see this game, and then I tried it out for the first time, and I was shocked at how many guns there were like. This game is soooooooo amazing. I highly recommend it
This is one of the first games I played, it's amazing and good introduction to VR shooters.
crashes every time i use it every time i kill a person it crashes if you could fix this this should be a great game

As part of a family that has been in the army for many generations this is a very good game this has many mass manufactured weapons this a game for  people that are looking for a Vr shooting range experience I would highly recommend

The one and only thing that would make this even more fun would be to make it multiplayer. I would love to be in the firing range with my friends just talking casually over gun fire. Also, can someone tell me a way to reset the targets? And while you are at it can you make it so we can pre lobby in the firing range before launching a mission.
Nice game, realistic handling.and its super fun. can you make more kill house maps. thank you for your time to create the game.
So cool

Zero caliber 1 was perfect. They shouldn't try to change what worked. The only thing they should have done was maybe update the graphics and no grenade launchers (too op), allow PVp uniform customizability, the ability to switch melee weapons to loadout would be great and dropped weapons should disappear after 2nd death to prevent lag

One star I won’t even  download it on my headset￼￼ it’s Garbage￼ Maybe make a better game I was super excited to download But It’s garbage one  star And it took up all my memory I can’t play any games now￼

reviews.review_title: Great idea, closest thing to shareware
reviews.review_description: This was a great idea to do and the closest thing to what the old shareware relic used to be in the 90's and shareware  needs a comeback to get VR gaming boosted. Too bad this wasn't available when Zero Caliber 2 launched or it would have likely really increased sales.

Everytime I uninstall your game to remove it from my Quest 3 headset, it automatically re-downloads and installs itself again the next day when I turn my Quest 3 back on. It's happened 3 days in a row so far. Please fix this bug! Thanks.

reviews.review_description: I had the delete the game for storage but it has the mp40 ppsh Mac 10 draco and a lot of cool guns and they have the reclaimer 10 shotgun from call of duty
Well do not worry, here you can try all the guns without the weight, sound or any feeling of danger. The playmobil of guns. Slow, meek, polite guns that won’t scare your grandmas cat.

developer_response.body:
Hey, thanks for the feedback! 
We have posters all around the shooting range area with tips and tricks, as well as a controller mapping with explanation of which button does what in the settings (under controls). 

With that out of the way, could you please detail a bit more of what you did not like? Just so we have a chance to learn from your feedback. Feel free to edit this review, or drop us a line to support@xrealgames.com (or any of our socials). /// Cheers, Dan
